utility_evaluation.REASONING:

4. ACCOMMODATION: ✓ Fully specified - Hotel name (Family Haven Hotel), address (Carrer de Mallorca 401, 08013 Barcelona, Spain), and cost (€175/night × 4 nights = €700) are all provided.

6. ADDITIONAL_SERVICES: ✓ Fully specified - School notification service is listed with cost (Free). This addresses the user's request to contact the school.

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown provided including flights (€400), accommodation (€700), activities (€360), total estimate (€1,460), and remaining budget (€240).

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified with all necessary details.
